title: Product groups - Adding a new product group
workflow_title: Product groups - Adding a new product group

steps.caption: In the DISH POS Backoffice, under Articles open Product groups.
Click Add product group in the upper right corner.
Give the product group a name.
Choose a logical Parent product group to keep the structure clear.
Set the correct Turnover group and VAT rate for reporting.
Optionally set the Course and Production attributes (printer/kitchen screen).
Click Save to create the product group.
Then go to General, the sub-category General, and click Send to push the changes to your POS.
